name: Beef Stew~ Pressure Cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the pressure cooker.
2. Add shortening to the pot.
3. Brown the beef in batches until browned on all sides.
4. Add the sliced onions, potatoes, frozen peas, carrot, and stewed tomatoes to the pot with water.
5. Securely close the lid of the pressure cooker.
6. Place the pressure regulator on the vent pipe.
7. Cook under high pressure for 10-12 minutes.
8. Immediately turn off the heat source and release any remaining pressure safely.
9. If desired, stir in a paste made from 1 tablespoon flour mixed with 1/4 cup water to thicken the stew.
